---
description: "Plan and implement a new feature across the portal codebase. Decomposes into component tasks, delegates to specialist agents, and runs security + accessibility validation."
agent: "planner"
argument-hint: "Describe the feature you want to add"
---

Plan and implement the following feature request. Break it down into component-level tasks, delegate to the appropriate specialist agents (database, api, portal, mcp, infrastructure, github), and run security + UI/accessibility reviews as quality gates before reporting completion.

Feature: ${input:feature_description}
